mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 7.5%, labor market slack suppresses corporate earnings growth expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7.5%, or signal loses predictive power after 2010.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals broad-based consumer demand recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during periods of stable inflation indicates capacity utilization improvements that boost short-term equity momentum over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or becomes statistically insignificant when CPIAUCSL month-over-month growth exceeds 0.4%.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect strengthening economic activity that supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive payroll revisions consistently coincide with negative 20-day forward returns in >50% of observations over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index surpasses 230, inflation expectations force monetary tightening fears that compress equity valuations and produce negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in >65% of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds 230, or the signal shows no predictive power after controlling for rate expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP growth combined with falling unemployment creates a synchronized economic expansion that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a baseline mean-reversion model in walk-forward tests, or direction flips during financial stress periods.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing industrial output and stable retail sales indicates inventory buildup that precedes corporate earnings downgrades and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Short-term returns remain positive when industrial production decelerates while retail sales hold steady, or the signal loses significance during supply chain disruptions.
